mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional base rate over a 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening construction activity, credit stress, and falling durable-goods demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% over 6 months or crosses below 1500
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST weakness is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations across walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: High policy rates combined with rising consumer prices tighten real financing conditions and raise equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 5.0% while CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-rate and positive-inflation trigger has nonnegative average 20-day excess returns or Rank IC below 0.03 in every 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, reducing expected earnings growth and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE increases of at least 0.3pp over 3 months are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals expanding factory output and stronger cyclical earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO 3-month growth crossings do not produce higher mean 5-day S&P 500 returns than negative crossings at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth paired with stable unemployment signals broad labor-income support without immediate recession pressure, sustaining consumption and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE does not rise over the same 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-stable condition has lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than all other observations in a walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: High policy rates combined with falling housing starts transmit credit tightening into the real economy, weakening earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is above 5.0% and HOUST 6-month growth is below -10%
failure_condition: Reject if this joint trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations or has nonnegative median returns.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity breadth is positive when retail sales and industrial production rise together, signaling demand and output confirmation that produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and INDPRO both have positive 3-month growth
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous positive 3-month growth in RSAFS and INDPRO fails to outperform periods when only one series is positive over 60-day forward returns.
